Video.summary: While Tony investigates the murder of a local drug and weapons dealer, Rachel is taken hostage.
Video.title: Romeo And Juliet

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: Tony is asked to keep a young girl from being returned to her sexually abusive father.
Video.title: The Letter Of The Law

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: Tony runs up against an overzealous security guard; Rachel's father turns to Tony for help in a business deal.
Video.title: Security

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Tony discovers David is dating the daughter of a ruthless bookie.
Video.title: Bank Job

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: A prominent doctor kills an officer's wife while driving drunk.
Video.title: Dead Drunk

Video.summary: Reno's surprise reunion with Leeza Bendetti at Bobby's scenic Duck Lake cabin is soured when he stumbles upon a trio of drug dealers and their rolling narcotics lab in the adjoining woods.
Video.title: Rabbit Redux

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Bobby and a reluctant Reno head to San Francisco when Bobby is contacted by a Import/Export magnate to find alleged Industrial spy Rikki Yeager.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 1

Video.summary: After Reno saves Rikki Yeager from a psychotic bounty hunter, his attempt to turn her over goes up in smoke when the plane sent for their transport explodes in an obvious ambush plot.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 2

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn

Video.summary: The death of a research scientist draws Tom and Cassy into a secret project searching for extraterrestrial life.
Video.title: Total Eclipse

Video.summary: A pair of Miami Beach detectives try to protect an important witness from being killed by his mob boss.
Video.title: Three Ring Circus

Video.summary: Cassy goes undercover to bring down a prison warden who's selling inmates into sexual slavery.
Video.title: The Party

Video.summary: After becoming a licensed private detective, Ramone's first case stumbles into a murder.
Video.title: Ramone P.I.

Video.summary: A prostitute's murder uncovers a blackmail scheme.
Video.title: Escorting Disaster

Video.summary: Cassy is framed for the murder of her ex-boyfriend by a deranged man seeking revenge.
Video.title: Genius

Video.summary: While investigating the murder of a lawyer, Tom and Cassy come in contact with the judge who preside over their divorce, whom Tom thinks was unfair when he presided.
Video.title: Divorce, Palm Beach Style

Video.summary: A murder exposes a secret society of wealthy wives who get their kicks through crime.
Video.title: When She Was Bad

Video.summary: A men's magazine king is a suspect in the car bomb murder of his wife and business partner.
Video.title: Pre-Judgement Day
